graphdb_rdf.metric_question: What are the conditions under which an AI system in a pre-defined high-risk area may nonetheless NOT be classified as high-risk?
graphdb_rdf.metric_answer: An AI system in a pre-defined high-risk area may not be classified as high-risk under certain conditions. These conditions are specified by the European Commission and relate to the specific characteristics and context of the AI system. 1. **General-Purpose AI Systems**: If the AI system is a general-purpose AI system, it may not be classified as high-risk despite being in a high-risk area. 2. **Specific Use Cases**: The classification may also depend on the specific use case of the AI system, which might mitigate its risk profile. 3. **Regulatory Amendments**: The European Commission may amend the classification criteria based on evolving understanding and technological developments. For more detailed information, you can refer to the entity that outlines these conditions: [conditions under which an AI system is not to be considered high-risk](https://euaiact.eu/resource/Entity/conditions_under_which_an_AI_system_is_not_to_be_considered_high-risk).
